title: Env-var inventory registry schema (v1)
description: Per splock implplan §I.impl.2 + §I.impl.3. SOLE source of truth for the EnvVarSpec dict shape. Consumed by bin/_env_inventory/registry.py at import time. Forward-compat per §B.impl.6: unknown schema_version refused with exit code 5 + structured stderr {"error":"unsupported_schema_version","kind":"env_inventory","seen":N,"supported":[1]}.

schema_version.description: Forward-compat sentinel. Currently only v1 is supported.

entries.description: Map from env-var name (UPPER_SNAKE_CASE) to its EnvVarSpec entry.

type.description: Logical type. 'numeric' accepts int or float (e.g., USD amounts).

default.description: Default value when unset. May be null (=> 'unset' semantics).

min.description: Lower bound (inclusive) for numeric vars. Absent for string-type.

max.description: Upper bound (inclusive) for numeric vars. Absent for string-type, or null for unbounded.

valid_values.description: Closed enum for string vars (optional; absent => free string with optional regex).

regex.description: Validation regex for string-type vars (e.g., MODEL_PIN_RE).

propagation_class.description: Closed enum per §I.impl.4. Each class carries a per-class read-discipline contract.

consumed_by.description: Sections / hook scripts / CLIs that read this var at runtime.

plan_citation.description: Cross-link to plan / implplan section for traceability.
